prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 海南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校。软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年第144名→2022年第130名→2023年第118名→2024年第104名→2025年第93名→2026年第87名，排名提升反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所上升；2023年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面（教师不配合核酸检测事件），2024年转为中性/混合（分数线不断上涨引发新生对保研率的担忧）。抖音热度为较热（总排名第32位，综合热度约136.5万），短视频平台曝光度处于中上水平，反映报考关注度尚可。未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中海南大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业（计算机、电子信息、自动化、机械等）高度匹配，相关专业报考热度较高。广西2026年物理类考生估算约264600人，较2025年（260429人）小幅增加约1.6%，竞争略有加剧。省控线近年基本稳定（物理类本科批370左右），未出现大幅波动；海南大学位于海南省海口市，与广西地理相邻，气候文化相近，对广西考生有一定地域吸引力。该校在广西招生占比约2.2%–2.4%，跨省招生比例稳定，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近两年位次稳定在23500–24000区间、2026年招生计划持平、广西物理类考生小幅增加、学校排名持续上升提升吸引力等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约24000名，区间23500–24500名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约24000名，区间23500–24500名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如23500名以内）可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术、软件工程等一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（24500名附近）建议以二档专业为主，兼顾三档保底。海南大学农林特色明显，农学类相关专业录取位次相对靠后，可作为稳妥保底选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 29892 → 29422 → 34627 → 23524 → 23955. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (34627), followed by a substantial recovery to 23524 in 2024, and stability around 23955 in 2025, with a baseline range of approximately 23700–24000 in recent two years. The enrollment plan for Hainan University in Guangxi Physics Category: 2021: 122 → 2022: 141 → 2023: 153 → 2024: 175 → 2025: 172 → 2026: 172. The 2026 plan remains unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hainan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Academic Ranking of World Universities (ARWU) has been steadily rising: 2021: 144th → 2022: 130th → 2023: 118th → 2024: 104th → 2025: 93rd → 2026: 87th. This improvement reflects the university's enhanced comprehensive strength, increasing its appeal to candidates. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation was somewhat negative (due to the incident of teachers not cooperating with nucleic acid testing), but turned neutral/mixed in 2024 (rising admission scores causing concerns among new students about graduate school recommendation rates). Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 32nd overall, with a comprehensive popularity of approximately 1.365 million), indicating above-average exposure on short video platforms and moderate attention from applicants. No significant admission gaps or discontinuities have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hainan University...

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended, aligning well with the university's Physics Category admission majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, Mechanical Engineering, etc.), leading to high application enthusiasm for related majors. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Guangxi for 2026 is about 264,600, a slight increase of approximately 1.6% from 2025 (260,429), intensifying competition slightly. The provincial control line has been relatively stable in recent years (Physics Category undergraduate batch around 370), with no significant fluctuations. Hainan University is located in Haikou City, Hainan Province, geographically adjacent to Guangxi with similar climate and culture, offering some regional appeal to Guangxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.2%–2.4%, with a stable cross-provincial enrollment ratio and no significant changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking range of 23500–24000 in recent two years, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in Guangxi Physics Category candidates, and the continuous rise in university rankings enhancing its appeal, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with a minor backward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 24000, with a range of 23500–24500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 24000, range 23500–24500. Candidates within this range are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 23500) can focus on applying for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Software Engineering. Those with rankings near the upper limit (around 24500) should mainly choose Tier 2 majors, supplemented by Tier 3 safety options. Hainan University has a distinct agricultural and forestry characteristic, with relatively lower admission rankings for agriculture-related majors, making them reliable safety choices.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科排名从2021年第144名持续上升至2026年第87名，排名提升增强学校整体吸引力，对文理科考生均有正向影响；2023年偏负面（师德师风事件），2024年转为中性/混合（分数线上涨争议），抖音热度较热（总排名32）。整体声誉平稳偏正面，未见明显负面舆情冲击；第五轮学科评估中海南大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、汉语言文学等文科专业社会热度推荐，法学专业因考公优势持续受关注。广西2026年历史类考生估算约127400人，较2025年（119153人）增加约6.9%，考生规模扩大对竞争有加剧作用。省控线近年稳定（历史类本科批400–402），未出现大幅波动；海南与广西地理相邻，气候文化相近，对广西考生有天然地域吸引力。该校在广西招生占比约2.2%–2.4%，跨省招生比例稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次前移至3011名、2026年计划小幅扩招（+3人）、历史类考生增加约6.9%等因素，扩招的缓解效应与考生增加的加剧效应部分抵消，但学校排名持续上升对报考热度的提振作用更为显著，预计位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约3124名，区间2624–3624名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2564 → 3527 → 3535 → 3447 → 3011. The ranking was optimal in 2021 (2564), fluctuated between 3447 and 3535 from 2022 to 2024, and rebounded to 3011 in 2025, showing an overall forward trend in recent 3 years; the enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi: 36 in 2021 → 56 in 2022 → 49 in 2023 → 40 in 2024 → 38 in 2025 → 41 in 2026. The 2026 plan expands by 3 students (about 7.9%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science ranking continuously rose from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, enhancing overall attractiveness, positively impacting both arts and science candidates; slightly negative in 2023 (teacher ethics incident), turned neutral/mixed in 2024 (score increase controversy), Douyin popularity relatively hot (overall rank 32). Overall reputation stable and slightly positive, no significant negative public opinion impact; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hainan University.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and other liberal arts majors are socially recommended; Law major continues to attract attention due to civil service exam advantages. The estimated number of History Category candidates in Guangxi in 2026 is about 127,400, an increase of about 6.9% from 2025 (119,153), intensifying competition. Provincial control line stable in recent years (History Category undergraduate batch 400–402), no significant fluctuations; Hainan and Guangxi are geographically adjacent, with similar climate and culture, naturally attractive to Guangxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.2%–2.4%, with stable cross-provincial enrollment ratio.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the ranking forward shift to 3011 in 2025, slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+3 students), and about 6.9% increase in History Category candidates, the easing effect of expansion and the intensifying effect of candidate increase partially offset each other, but the continuous rise in school ranking has a more significant boosting effect on application popularity, expecting a slight backward shift in ranking compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking about 3124, range 2624–3624.
